title: GeyserMovementFix
description: A Paper Plugin that fixes the movement issues that occur for bedrock players while moving.
body:
# **GeyserMovementFix** NOTE: This plugin is discontinued and its functionality has been migrated to my new open source plugin called geyserfixes. - https://modrinth.com/plugin/geyserfixes - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/geyserfixes This is a Paper Plugin that fixes the movement issues that occur for bedrock players while moving, these include: - Getting stuck in lanterns - Randomly getting pulled back when walking - and any other movement related lag. ### NOTE: Make sure to also set server's movement tolerence to 100. this one fixes the illegal movement lag, the server setting fixes the internet lag. ## **How it works:** This plugin checks if a player is from bedrock edition, and disables Clipping movement rejection only for them. You'll need to have Floodgate installed aswell. Thats it :)
 

If you want to support me and donate a small amount, please consider this one time patreon donation (no subscription or membership)
Join My Patreon

Join the discord for help and chat:

Areed's Discord Server

*** plugin icon is Designed by Freepik
